qry:select.name: DatosLiq
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq, LIQ19.c_clase from liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19 WHERE liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: INEGRESO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP AS IDD, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01 JOIN PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %} and per02.oi_indic_activo = 4 and (liq07.l_liq_final = 0 or isnull(liq07.l_liq_final) or LIQ19.l_ajuste = 1) AND {%? (string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_PERSONAL_EMP) %}) %} {% 1 = 2 %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NOINEGRESO
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP AS IDD, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01 JOIN PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %} and per02.oi_indic_activo = 4 and (liq07.l_liq_final = 0 or isnull(liq07.l_liq_final) or LIQ19.l_ajuste = 1) AND {%? (string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_PERSONAL_EMP) %}) %} {% 1 = 1 %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: IN
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP AS IDD, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01 JOIN PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %} and per02.oi_indic_activo = 1
and not(LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq = 1) AND {%? (string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_PERSONAL_EMP) %}) %} {% 1 = 2 %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NOIN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP AS IDD, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01 JOIN PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %} and per02.oi_indic_activo = 1 and not(LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq = 1) AND {%? (string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_PERSONAL_EMP) %}) %} {% 1 = 1 %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: INHABMEN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP AS IDD, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01 JOIN PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %} and per02.oi_indic_activo = 1 and liq19.c_clase = \'M\' and L01.oi_tipo_personal in (1,4,8,3) and LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq = 1 AND {%? (string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_PERSONAL_EMP) %}) %} {% 1 = 2 %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NOINHABMEN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP AS IDD, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01 JOIN PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %} and per02.oi_indic_activo = 1 and liq19.c_clase = \'M\' and L01.oi_tipo_personal in (1,4,8,3) and LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq = 1 AND {%? (string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_PERSONAL_EMP) %}) %} {% 1 = 1 %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: INHABQUIN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP AS IDD, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01 JOIN PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %} and per02.oi_indic_activo = 1 and liq19.c_clase = \'Q\' and L01.oi_tipo_personal in (2,5) and LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq = 1 AND {%? (string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_PERSONAL_EMP) %}) %} {% 1 = 2 %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NOINHABQUIN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP AS IDD, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01 JOIN PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:helper-mess/@ID %} and per02.oi_indic_activo = 1 and liq19.c_clase = \'Q\' and L01.oi_tipo_personal in (2,5) and LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq = 1 AND {%? (string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_personal_emp)!='') {% PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in ({%=string(#FILTRO:helper-mess/rows/row/@oi_PERSONAL_EMP) %}) %} {% 1 = 1 %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC ')/ROWS/ROW
